zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Gardner於1559年11月19日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯普盧頓時，她的父親Thomas Gardner30歲，母親Elizabeth Harrison20歲。她於1575年1月13日與Robert Cutler II在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1631年10月11日在英國素福爾可斯普盧頓享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Gardner于1559年11月19日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可斯普盧頓时，她的父亲Thomas Gardner30岁，母亲Elizabeth Harrison20岁。她于1575年1月13日与Robert Cutler II在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1631年10月11日在英国素福爾可斯普盧頓享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可易普斯維其。

nameMeanings.name: Gardner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name from Middle English gardener ‘gardener’, Old French gardinier, jardinier.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German Gärtner or Gartner and French Desjardins .

variants.name: Garden
meanings: English and Scottish: metonymic occupational name for a gardener or topographic name for one who lived by a garden, from Middle English, Older Scots gardin, garde(i)n ‘garden; enclosed area for ground for cultivation’, Old French gardin. Compare Gardner .
German (North Rhine-Westphalia): patronymic from   Gard   or   Garde  .
French: occupational name for a guardian, from gardenc, an old derivative of Old French garde ‘watch, protection’. This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Gartner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Gerda, Johann, Lorenz, Otto, Wolfgang, Bernd, Dieter, Frieda, Fritz, Gerhard.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (also Gärtner): occupational name for a gardener or vintner, from an agent derivative of Middle High German garte ‘enclosure, garden’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and in Slovenia (see 2 below). Compare Gaertner and Gardner .
Slovenian: of German origin (see 1 above). In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the Slovenized variant Gartnar.

variants.name: Gardiner
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Gardner  .

History: Lion Gardiner came from England in 1635 to Saybrook, CT, the settlement of Earl of Warwick patentees at the mouth of the Connecticut River, and built a fort there. Born in 1636, his son, David, was the first white child born in the settlement. Lion later bought the Isle of Wight, now Gardiners Island, from the Indians, and moved his family there until 1653, when he bought land in what is now Easthampton, Long Island, NY.

variants.name: Giardino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Cosmo, Nicola, Rocco, Romeo, Sal, Vito.

Italian (mainly south): from giardino ‘garden’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a gardener (see Gardner ), a topographic name for someone who lived by a garden, or a habitational name from any of various places called Giardino, for example in Bologna, or from Giardina Gallotti, or Giardinello in Palermo.

variants.name: Cartner
meanings: English (Cumberland): variant of   Gardner   in which /g/ and /d/ have been devoiced.
Americanized form of German Gärtner ‘gardener’ (see Gartner , compare 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Gardner was born on 19 November 1559, in Sproughton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Gardner, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth Harrison, was 20. She married Robert Cutler II on 13 January 1575, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 11 October 1631, in Sproughton, Suffolk, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St Pancras, Chichester, West Sussex, Eng: Chichester St Pancras, Chichester, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Gardner est née le 19 novembre 1559, à Sproughton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Gardner, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Harrison, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Cutler II le 13 janvier 1575, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 octobre 1631, à Sproughton, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Gardner am 19. November 1559 in Sproughton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Gardner 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Harrison 20. Sie hat am 13. Januar 1575 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England Robert Cutler II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Oktober 1631 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Sproughton, Suffolk, England und wurde in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Gardner è nata il il 19 novembre 1559 nel Sproughton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Gardner, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Harrison, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Robert Cutler II il 13 gennaio 1575, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 11 ottobre 1631, nel Sproughton, Suffolk, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Ipswich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Gardnerが1559年11月19日にイギリスイギリススフォルクスプロウトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Gardnerは30歳，母Elizabeth Harrisonは20歳であった。1575年1月13日にイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードでRobert Cutler IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1631年10月11日にイギリススフォルクスプロウトンで71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Pancras, Chichester, West Sussex, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 치체스터 치체스터 스트 파크라스
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Gardner(이)가 1559년 11월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스프루그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Gardner(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Harrison(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1575년 1월 13일 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 Robert Cutler II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1631년 10월 11일 영국 수폴크 스프루그h턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치에 묻혔다.

pt.19 November 1559–11 October 1631: 19 de novembro de 1559–11 de outubro de 1631
pt.St Pancras, Chichester, West Sussex, Eng: Chichester St Pancras, Chichester, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Chichester, West Sussex, England: Chichester, West Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Gardner nasceu em 19 de novembro de 1559, em Sproughton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Gardner, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Harrison, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Cutler II em 13 de janeiro de 1575, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1631, em Sproughton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Pancras, Chichester, West Sussex, Eng: шичестир ст панкрас, шичестир, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Gardner родилась 19 ноября 1559 г. в местности спроугтон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Gardner было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Harrison, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Cutler II 13 января 1575 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 11 октября 1631 г. в местности спроугтон, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.19 November 1559–11 October 1631: 19 de noviembre de 1559–11 de octubre de 1631

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Gardner nació el 19 de noviembre de 1559, en Sproughton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Gardner, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Harrison, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Robert Cutler II el 13 de enero de 1575, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1631, en Sproughton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
